mapper.sql: id, case_id, source_case_id, reuse_type, project_id, create_user, cs_factor_c1, cs_factor_c2, cs_factor_c3, cs_factor_c4, cs_factor_c5, cs_factor_c6, cs_score, complexity_level, case_type, env_factor, algo_expected_write_ms, algo_expected_exec_ms, platform_actual_write_ms, case_source_type, modification_cost_ms, saved_write_ms, uqs_score, reuse_count, modify_count, create_time, update_time, last_calc_time
mapper.insert: insert into spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail (id, case_id, source_case_id, reuse_type, project_id, create_user, cs_factor_c1, cs_factor_c2, cs_factor_c3, cs_factor_c4, cs_factor_c5, cs_factor_c6, cs_score, complexity_level, case_type, env_factor, algo_expected_write_ms, algo_expected_exec_ms, platform_actual_write_ms, case_source_type, modification_cost_ms, saved_write_ms, uqs_score, reuse_count, modify_count, create_time, update_time, last_calc_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceCaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reuseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{csFactorC1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csFactorC2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csFactorC3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csFactorC4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csFactorC5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csFactorC6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{csScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{complexityLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{envFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{algoExpectedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{algoExpectedExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{platformActualWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{caseSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modificationCostMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{savedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{uqsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reuseCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modifyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastCalcTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail set case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_case_id = #{sourceCaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reuse_type = #{reuseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cs_factor_c1 = #{csFactorC1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_factor_c2 = #{csFactorC2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_factor_c3 = #{csFactorC3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_factor_c4 = #{csFactorC4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_factor_c5 = #{csFactorC5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_factor_c6 = #{csFactorC6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cs_score = #{csScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, complexity_level = #{complexityLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_type = #{caseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, env_factor = #{envFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, algo_expected_write_ms = #{algoExpectedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, algo_expected_exec_ms = #{algoExpectedExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, platform_actual_write_ms = #{platformActualWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, case_source_type = #{caseSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modification_cost_ms = #{modificationCostMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, saved_write_ms = #{savedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, uqs_score = #{uqsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reuse_count = #{reuseCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modify_count = #{modifyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_calc_time = #{lastCalcTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail (id, case_id, source_case_id, reuse_type, project_id, create_user, cs_factor_c1, cs_factor_c2, cs_factor_c3, cs_factor_c4, cs_factor_c5, cs_factor_c6, cs_score, complexity_level, case_type, env_factor, algo_expected_write_ms, algo_expected_exec_ms, platform_actual_write_ms, case_source_type, modification_cost_ms, saved_write_ms, uqs_score, reuse_count, modify_count, create_time, update_time, last_calc_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sourceCaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reuseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.csFactorC1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csFactorC2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csFactorC3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csFactorC4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csFactorC5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csFactorC6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.csScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.complexityLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.caseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.envFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.algoExpectedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.algoExpectedExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.platformActualWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.caseSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modificationCostMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.savedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.uqsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.reuseCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.modifyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.lastCalcTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
